violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface Reach-in-cooler was not cleaned as frequently as required.--Nonfood contact surface Reach-in-Freezer was not cleaned as frequently as required.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil *Plates were not covered or inverted during storage.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
